programs.title: Travel Thru History
programs.desc: Learning about how the Hoover Dam was built, why it's necessary, and a behind the scenes look at its inner workings.

programs.title: 5 Star Getaways
programs.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5-star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programs.title: Facing Waves
programs.desc: New Caledonia native and professional surfer, Sarah Houser takes Nikki on a SUP and surf adventure in New Caledonia.

programs.title: Dream Purchase
programs.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programs.title: Road Less Traveled
programs.desc: In stunning Lago di Garda Jonathan attempts to pull off a paragliding maneuver which almost put him in a wet grave last summer. Nearby, in the city of Bolzano, he joins a crack helicopter rescue force to pull another paraglider off the cliffs.

programs.title: Dream Cruises
programs.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.
